privacy_section_1_content: GOODLY (hereinafter "we", "our" or "the Application") is committed to protecting the privacy and personal data of its users. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, share and protect your personal information in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable data protection laws.
privacy_section_2_content:
The data controller for your personal data is:

GOODLY
Email: danielrollin237@gmail.com

For any questions regarding your personal data, you can contact us at the above coordinates.
privacy_section_3_content:
We collect the following data when you use GOODLY:

• Registration data:
  - Username
  - Email address
  - Password (encrypted)
  - Biography (optional)
  - Profile photo (optional)

• Content data:
  - Publications (texts, photos, videos)
  - Comments and interactions
  - Geolocation (optional)

• Technical data:
  - IP address
  - Device type and operating system
  - Navigation and usage data
  - Cookies and similar technologies

• Payment data:
  - Payment information (processed by Stripe)
  - Transaction history
privacy_section_4_content:
We process your personal data on the following legal bases:

• Contract performance: To provide you with the Application services (account creation, content publication, social interactions)

• Legitimate interest: To improve our services, ensure platform security, prevent fraud and analyze usage

• Consent: For non-essential cookies, geolocation, and marketing communications (which you can withdraw at any time)

• Legal obligation: To comply with our legal and regulatory obligations
privacy_section_5_content:
Your personal data is used to:

• Create and manage your user account
• Publish and display your content on the platform
• Enable interactions with other users
• Process your payments and donations
• Improve and personalize your experience
• Ensure security and prevent abuse
• Moderate published content
• Send you important notifications
• Analyze Application usage
• Comply with our legal obligations
privacy_section_6_content:
We never sell your personal data. We may share your data only in the following cases:

• With other users: Your public profile and publications are visible to other users according to your privacy settings

• Service providers:
  - Stripe (secure payments)
  - Cloud hosting (AWS)
  - Analytics services

• Legal obligations: If required by law, court order or to protect our rights

• With your consent: In any other case, only with your explicit agreement
privacy_section_7_content:
• Active account: Your data is retained as long as your account is active

• After account deletion: Your data is deleted within 30 days, unless there is a legal obligation to retain it

• Moderation data: Retained for 1 year to prevent abuse

• Billing data: Retained for 10 years in accordance with accounting obligations
privacy_section_8_content:
In accordance with the GDPR, you have the following rights:

• Right of access: Obtain a copy of your personal data

• Right to rectification: Correct your inaccurate or incomplete data

• Right to erasure: Request the deletion of your data (under certain conditions)

• Right to restriction: Restrict the processing of your data

• Right to portability: Receive your data in a structured format

• Right to object: Object to the processing of your data

• Right to withdraw consent: At any time, without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing

To exercise these rights, contact us at: contact@goodly.app
privacy_section_9_content:
We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your data:

• Password encryption (bcrypt)
• Secure HTTPS connections
• Secure JWT authentication
• Regular backups
• Limited access to personal data
• Continuous security monitoring
• Active content moderation
privacy_section_10_content:
We use cookies and similar technologies for:

• Essential cookies: Necessary for the Application to function (authentication, security)

• Performance cookies: To analyze usage and improve our services

You can manage your cookie preferences in your browser settings.
privacy_section_11_content:
Your data may be transferred and stored outside the European Economic Area (EEA):

• AWS servers (Northern Europe - Stockholm)
• Stripe (United States - with appropriate safeguards)

These transfers are made in accordance with GDPR requirements with appropriate safeguards (standard contractual clauses).
privacy_section_12_content:
GOODLY is not intended for persons under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 16.

If you become aware that a child under 16 has provided us with personal data, please contact us immediately.
privacy_section_13_content:
We may modify this privacy policy at any time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an update date.

Important changes will be notified to you by email or notification in the Application.
privacy_section_14_content:
For any questions regarding this privacy policy or your personal data:

Email: danielrollin237@gmail.com

You also have the right to file a complaint with the competent data protection authorities in your country.
privacy_section_15_content: By using GOODLY, you acknowledge having read and understood this privacy policy and you consent to the processing of your personal data as described above.
privacy_commitment: We are committed to protecting your privacy in accordance with GDPR
secure_payment_stripe_info: Secure payment by Stripe. Points will be credited automatically.

Donation of ${amount}$ received successfully!
You received {points} impact points.

about_goodly_combines: GOODLY is a next-generation social network that combines:
about_no_followers_impact: Unlike other social networks, GOODLY is not based on followers, but on the user's real impact.
about_visibility_new_users: Visibility accessible even to new users
about_top_300_visible: Every user can appear in the TOP 300, visible to everyone.
about_badge_earned_or_validated: The blue badge can be: earned through activity or obtained with admin validation.
about_badge_transforms_profile: The blue badge transforms a profile into a visible reference.
about_boost_duration: Visibility boost for a defined duration
about_more_users_access: Access to more users without cheating
about_ideal_for_creators: Ideal for: content creators, entrepreneurs, events, personal projects
about_visibility_controllable: Your visibility is no longer limited, it's controllable.
about_stories_events_feature: Share your local life with the entire community:
about_publish_events: Publish local events on the map
about_link_shop: Link your stories to your shop
about_stories_no_followers: Stories are seen by ALL nearby users, with no follower system!
about_advantages_geolocated: Advantages of geolocated stories and events:
about_no_follower_system: No need for followers to be seen
about_promote_shop_events: Promote your local events and products
about_shop_story_benefit: Post a story from your shop to attract nearby customers!
about_goodly_gives_identity: GOODLY gives you a credible social identity.
